name: Lost in Space
description:
"Can anyone hear me...?"

—NO ANSWER—

--- PLOT ---

You were a pilot for the space colony Hera-01, one of the best, for that matter. You had done so many rounds in your ship, both to explore different uninhabited planets and to defend yours, that you didn't think about your last one. The description did say that the journey would be longer, but your ship would make it just fine (according to the specifications for the mission), so you took it and hopped on to your ship.

You were careful, though, you got yourself enough supplies that to last you the entire trip, you checked your ship's systems thrice so that you were 100% sure the mission would go smoothly. You hopped on your ship and you began your journey. According to the files of the mission, it would take you about a month to reach your destination, nothing too crazy. But there was one variable that you couldn't prepare for...

While the ship was on auto-pilot and were resting, you started feeling a bit of turbulence, nothing too crazy at first, but it was enough to make you want to check on the ship's systems. As time went on, the turbulence became more and more fierce, you desperately started checking to see what was wrong with your systems, and then you found it: a sensor detected that a solar storm was interfering with your systems, and everything was getting worse by the second, you changed your ship to manual navigation and tried to get out of the solar storm but it was too late, the systems were shutting down, and you were starting to move off-course. The entire ship ended up shutting down, leaving you stranded in space, with the oxygenation systems miraculously working, even if it was at its lowest capacity.
creator: JPSharker
